CVE-2017-10687.title: In LibSass 3.4.5, there is a heap-based buffer over-read in the f ...
CVE-2017-10687.summary: In LibSass 3.4.5, there is a heap-based buffer over-read in the function json_mkstream() in sass_context.cpp. A crafted input will lead to a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2017-11341.title: There is a heap based buffer over-read in lexer.hpp of LibSass 3. ...
CVE-2017-11341.summary: There is a heap based buffer over-read in lexer.hpp of LibSass 3.4.5. A crafted input will lead to a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2017-11342.title: There is an illegal address access in ast.cpp of LibSass 3.4.5. A ...
CVE-2017-11342.summary: There is an illegal address access in ast.cpp of LibSass 3.4.5. A crafted input will lead to a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2017-11555.title: There is an illegal address access in the Eval::operator function ...
CVE-2017-11555.summary: There is an illegal address access in the Eval::operator function in eval.cpp in LibSass 3.4.5. A crafted input will lead to a remote denial of service.

CVE-2017-11556.title: There is a stack consumption vulnerability in the Parser::advance ...
CVE-2017-11556.summary: There is a stack consumption vulnerability in the Parser::advanceToNextToken function in parser.cpp in LibSass 3.4.5. A crafted input may lead to remote denial of service.

CVE-2017-11605.title: There is a heap based buffer over-read in LibSass 3.4.5, related  ...
CVE-2017-11605.summary: There is a heap based buffer over-read in LibSass 3.4.5, related to address 0xb4803ea1. A crafted input will lead to a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2017-12962.title: There are memory leaks in LibSass 3.4.5 triggered by deeply neste ...
CVE-2017-12962.summary: There are memory leaks in LibSass 3.4.5 triggered by deeply nested code, such as code with a long sequence of open parenthesis characters, leading to a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2017-12963.title: There is an illegal address access in Sass::Eval::operator() in e ...
CVE-2017-12963.summary: There is an illegal address access in Sass::Eval::operator() in eval.cpp of LibSass 3.4.5, leading to a remote denial of service attack. NOTE: this is similar to CVE-2017-11555 but remains exploitable after the vendor's CVE-2017-11555 fix (available from GitHub after 2017-07-24).

CVE-2017-12964.title: There is a stack consumption issue in LibSass 3.4.5 that is trigg ...
CVE-2017-12964.summary: There is a stack consumption issue in LibSass 3.4.5 that is triggered in the function Sass::Eval::operator() in eval.cpp. It will lead to a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2018-11694.title: An issue was discovered in LibSass through 3.5.4. A NULL pointer  ...
CVE-2018-11694.summary: An issue was discovered in LibSass through 3.5.4. A NULL pointer dereference was found in the function Sass::Functions::selector_append which could be leveraged by an attacker to cause a denial of service (application crash) or possibly have unspecified other impact.

CVE-2018-11697.title: An issue was discovered in LibSass through 3.5.4. An out-of-bound ...
CVE-2018-11697.summary: An issue was discovered in LibSass through 3.5.4. An out-of-bounds read of a memory region was found in the function Sass::Prelexer::exactly() which could be leveraged by an attacker to disclose information or manipulated to read from unmapped memory causing a denial of service.

CVE-2018-11698.title: An issue was discovered in LibSass through 3.5.4. An out-of-bound ...
CVE-2018-11698.summary: An issue was discovered in LibSass through 3.5.4. An out-of-bounds read of a memory region was found in the function Sass::handle_error which could be leveraged by an attacker to disclose information or manipulated to read from unmapped memory causing a denial of service.

CVE-2018-19218.title: In LibSass 3.5-stable, there is an illegal address access at Sass ...
CVE-2018-19218.summary: In LibSass 3.5-stable, there is an illegal address access at Sass::Parser::parse_css_variable_value_token that will lead to a DoS attack.

CVE-2018-19219.title: In LibSass 3.5-stable, there is an illegal address access at Sass ...
CVE-2018-19219.summary: In LibSass 3.5-stable, there is an illegal address access at Sass::Eval::operator that will lead to a DoS attack.

CVE-2018-19797.title: In LibSass 3.5.5, a NULL Pointer Dereference in the function Sass ...
CVE-2018-19797.summary: In LibSass 3.5.5, a NULL Pointer Dereference in the function Sass::Selector_List::populate_extends in SharedPtr.hpp (used by ast.cpp and ast_selectors.cpp) may cause a Denial of Service (application crash) via a crafted sass input file.

CVE-2018-19838.title: In LibSass prior to 3.5.5, functions inside ast.cpp for IMPLEMENT ...
CVE-2018-19838.summary: In LibSass prior to 3.5.5, functions inside ast.cpp for IMPLEMENT_AST_OPERATORS expansion allow attackers to cause a denial-of-service resulting from stack consumption via a crafted sass file, as demonstrated by recursive calls involving clone(), cloneChildren(), and copy().

CVE-2018-20821.title: The parsing component in LibSass through 3.5.5 allows attackers t ...
CVE-2018-20821.summary: The parsing component in LibSass through 3.5.5 allows attackers to cause a denial-of-service (uncontrolled recursion in Sass::Parser::parse_css_variable_value in parser.cpp).

CVE-2018-20822.title: LibSass 3.5.4 allows attackers to cause a denial-of-service (unco ...
CVE-2018-20822.summary: LibSass 3.5.4 allows attackers to cause a denial-of-service (uncontrolled recursion in Sass::Complex_Selector::perform in ast.hpp and Sass::Inspect::operator in inspect.cpp).

CVE-2022-43357.title: Stack overflow vulnerability in ast_selectors.cpp in function Sas ...
CVE-2022-43357.summary: Stack overflow vulnerability in ast_selectors.cpp in function Sass::CompoundSelector::has_real_parent_ref in libsass:3.6.5-8-g210218, which can be exploited by attackers to causea denial of service (DoS). Also affects the command line driver for libsass, sassc 3.6.2.
